title: How to export the local image to docker format
body:
How to export the local image to docker format

I can see the details with commands
[root@localhost ~]# skopeo inspect containers-storage:xxxxx.xxxxxx.com/xxxxx/provid-spot-server:5

{
    "Name": "xxxxx.xxxxxx.com/xxxxx/provid-spot-server",
    "Digest": "sha256:3adba323bab12171019f1cd98f5962bad9af1f9684796404e45e4621eceed9df",
    "RepoTags": [],
    "Created": "2020-08-19T07:35:20.50010297Z",
    "DockerVersion": "18.06.1-ce",
    "Labels": {},
    "Architecture": "amd64",
    "Os": "linux",
    "Layers": [
        "sha256:53478ce18e19304e6e57c37c86ec0e7aa0abfe56dff7c6886ebd71684df7da25",
        "sha256:d1c225ed7c34b971d07972665694b54692ae4e5337ec463277c82e408afc62ce",
        "sha256:c6724ba0c09a9abac10a5d84cc53f9843cb7d81a465f9bca280ef300821e7a29",
        "sha256:a93cd1ce2cb2edd5c786b98d5846fd48758bdab9f2f868d74ed1d2c8d3c43ad0",
        "sha256:3db15decd4aa05c67e6b7aa4b703e4d8b024fe5b1760e2896a3a3f9875b99204",
        "sha256:997bfacab656edce9e88cfb36ed8e2ff538a55a6b3a29610e24ae0fc8ef54d3f",
        "sha256:bffa923ffd6452efe54063a632b60d737a93bb1e24978b54d889ac109176d486",
        "sha256:0fb47bee640a26da0ba5d0dfc42b4e90636bdc75dbf5316b240508ae952331cf"
    ],
    "Env": [
        "PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin:/usr/lib/jvm/java-1.8-openjdk/jre/bin:/usr/lib/jvm/java-1.8-openjdk/bin",
        "LANG=C.UTF-8",
        "JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-1.8-openjdk/jre",
        "JAVA_VERSION=8u111",
        "JAVA_ALPINE_VERSION=8.111.14-r0"
    ]
}

But I cannot export with command:
[root@localhost ~]# skopeo copy containers-storage:xxxxx.xxxxxx.com/xxxxx/provid-spot-server:5 docker-archive:/tmp/provid-spot-server.tar
Getting image source signatures
FATA[0001] Error reading blob sha256:9f8566ee5135862dd980160c27bd7721448a6f7f385bbb81f7f001f1b78a5fbf: stat /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/9f8566ee5135862dd980160c27bd7721448a6f7f385bbb81f7f001f1b78a5fbf: no such file or directory

How can i solve it, thank you!

comments.body:
> Error reading blob sha256:9f8566ee5135862dd980160c27bd7721448a6f7f385bbb81f7f001f1b78a5fbf: stat /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/9f8566ee5135862dd980160c27bd7721448a6f7f385bbb81f7f001f1b78a5fbf: no such file or directory

This indicates that a layer is missing in the local storage. Did some previous copy operation to the containers-storage fail or got killed?

I found the missing layer is in this place( /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay2 ), not in /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/
`
[root@localhost overlay2]# cd /var/lib/containers/storage/overlay2

[root@localhost overlay2]# ls 9f8566ee5135862dd980160c27bd7721448a6f7f385bbb81f7f001f1b78a5fbf
diff  empty  link  merged  work
`
What should i do？thank

This might require a much more specific c/storage reference, or accessing the right configuration files, e.g. in some Podman logs:
```
DEBU[0000] parsed reference into "[vfs@/home/cicd/.local/share/containers/storage+/run/user/1000/containers]myregistry.local/ubuntu:20.04-amd64"
```
(very likely your configuration will require a different […] part.) Skopeo does not read all of the configuration that Podman does.
Did you convert from overlay2 to overlay?  You might need to reset storage and start again.  Do not use overlay2 at all, it is the same as overlay.
Thank you all, I will try
